manifest.name: ByteGrid

name: ByteGrid

releases.author: waaraawa
releases.description:
## 🎉 Initial Release

  ByteGrid is an Obsidian plugin that visualizes binary data and C struct memory layouts 
  as interactive SVG diagrams.

  ### ✨ Features
  - 🎨 Auto color assignment for fields
  - 📏 Byte-accurate grid layouts
  - 🔍 Bitfield support with bit-level visualization
  - 🌈 Color schemes (default/dark/light)
  - 📊 Flexible legend (left/right/bottom, multi-column)
  - 🔢 Hexadecimal offset display
  - 📐 Row-major legend ordering

  ### 📦 Installation
  1. Download \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, and \`styles.css\`
  2. Place them in \`.obsidian/plugins/bytegrid/\`
  3. Enable the plugin in Obsidian settings
releases.name: ByteGrid v1.0.0
